extraction.one_line_summary: IGUITA Sergio won from late-caught breakaway via final 300m acceleration, DENNIS Rowan defended jersey through JUMBO-VISMA's stranglehold pacing
tactical_patterns: JUMBO-VISMA stranglehold pacing neutralized 2-minute breakaway advantage on penultimate climb without DENNIS attacking himself
RUBIO Einer's headwind solo effort caught in final 300m; PLAPP Luke's Australian champion chase showed JAYCO's ITT-specialist Stage 5 setup
BORA-HANSGROHE's 1-2 finish via IGUITA/VLASOV suggests preplanned leadout rather than individual opportunism on steep hilltop finish

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: defending champion dropped from lead group on penultimate climb, unexpected weakness for INEOS protected rider
rider_signals.RUBIO Einer: positive: MOVISTAR domestique dropped teammate RODRIGUEZ Oscar with solo acceleration, signal of emerging leadership ambitions
rider_signals.PLAPP Luke: positive: Australian champion bridged solo to flying RUBIO then contested finish, ITT specialist showing climbing transformation
rider_signals.VLASOV Alexander: positive: BORA co-leader finished 2nd without visible work, conserving form for final ITT where 15-second gap is vulnerable
rider_signals.DENNIS Rowan: neutral: controlled via team pacing without testing rivals, risky strategy with only 15-second margin before ITT specialty stage
